# Claude Platform

Updates to the Claude Platform, including the Claude API, client SDKs, and the Claude Console.

---

### April 16, 2026
- We've launched Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable generally available model.

### April 9, 2026
- We've launched the advisor tool in public beta.

### January 23rd, 2025
- We've launched citations capability in the API (ordinal-format date test).

### December 17th, 2024
- Features moved to GA.

### November 6th, 2024
- Claude 1 and Instant retired.
